allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\marti\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\proyecto\\trading" | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne "node_modules" } | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime3)

PowerShell($srv = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\marti\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\proyecto\\trading\\server.js" -Raw; $checks = @{ 'ws.on error'=$srv.Contains\("ws.on\('error'"\); 'wsConectando'=$srv.Contains\('wsConectando'\); 'BIGINT'=$srv.Contains\('BIGINT'\); 'migración DO'=$srv.Contains\('DO $$ BEGIN'\); 'LIMIT 5000'=$srv.Contains\('LIMIT 5000'\); '7 days'=$srv.Contains\('7 days'\); '/api/oi-live'=$srv.Contains\("'/api/oi-live'"\); 'idx_ballenas'=$srv.Contains\('idx_ballenas_fecha'\) }; $checks.GetEnumerator\(\) | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" })
